name: filter-bubble
description: Filter Bubble is a browser add-on/extension for Chrome and Firefox that enables you to hide content that you don't want to see on the web

scripts.package: npm run build:prod && rm -rf web-ext-artifacts/* && web-ext build
scripts.start:android: npm run build && web-ext run --target=firefox-android --android-device=$(adb devices 2>&1| awk '/./{device=$1} END{print device}') --verbose
scripts.zip: [ -z "$(git status --porcelain)" ] || { echo 'Error: uncommitted changes; the source archive packages HEAD. Commit first.' >&2; exit 1; }; mkdir -p web-ext-artifacts && git archive --format=tar.gz --prefix=filter-bubble-$npm_package_version/ -o web-ext-artifacts/filter-bubble-source-$npm_package_version.tar.gz HEAD
